pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads and saves the TCI file to this exact path.

pi_items.metadata_value: Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A TCI from AWS COGs
pi_items.verified_value: Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A TCI from AWS COGs
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh download URL (https://sentinel-cogs.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/.../TCI.tif) confirms the AWS COGs source.
Executing rasterio over the downloaded TCI.tif confirms exactly 3 bands.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A true color imagery (TCI) from the AWS COGs public dataset. The input file is saved to /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif and has exactly 3 original bands.
